title: Full-Stack Next.js Developer for E-Commerce Platform
description: We need an experienced Next.js developer to build a fully-featured e-commerce platform with payment integration including M-Pesa and card payments. The platform will serve over 5,000 SME merchants across Kenya and Uganda. You will own the entire frontend architecture, implement SSR/ISR strategies for product pages, and integrate Safaricom Daraja and Flutterwave. Strong TypeScript and PostgreSQL skills are essential. You must be comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment with weekly sprint reviews.

title: React Native Mobile App for Logistics Tracking
description: Build a cross-platform mobile application for real-time logistics and delivery tracking with distinct driver and customer interfaces. The app must handle live GPS tracking, push notifications for delivery status updates, in-app chat between driver and customer, and an admin dashboard. Firebase will be used for real-time database and authentication. The Google Maps SDK must support route optimisation for multiple stops. The app will launch on both iOS and Android.

title: UI/UX Designer for FinTech Dashboard
description: Design a clean, intuitive dashboard for a micro-savings fintech app targeting youth between 18-30 years old across East Africa. Deliverables include user research report, user flow diagrams, low and high fidelity wireframes, a complete Figma prototype, and a design system with components. You will conduct at least 5 user interviews and iterate on feedback. The final designs must meet WCAG AA accessibility standards and support both light and dark modes.

title: Data Analyst — Agricultural Market Intelligence
description: Analyse crop price trends and market data from 6 counties and produce weekly intelligence reports to help smallholder farmers get better prices. You will clean and process data from 3 government APIs, build automated Power BI dashboards refreshed daily, run statistical trend analysis, and write a monthly executive summary. Strong SQL skills are needed to query our PostgreSQL warehouse. Experience with agricultural data or rural Kenya context is a strong advantage.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist — Social Media Growth
description: Grow our social media presence from 2K to 20K followers over 3 months with organic and paid campaigns for our food delivery brand. You will manage Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook, produce a 3-month content calendar, run A/B tested Meta Ads campaigns with a monthly budget of KES 30,000, and report weekly on reach, engagement, and conversion. A portfolio of previous successful growth campaigns is required. Experience in the food and beverage industry is a bonus.

title: Technical Content Writer — Developer Blog
description: Write 4 in-depth technical blog posts per month covering React, Node.js, and cloud technologies for our developer-focused publication reaching 50,000 monthly readers. Each article must be 1,500–2,500 words, include working code samples tested in a sandbox, have proper SEO metadata, and pass our editorial review on first submission at least 80% of the time. You must be an active developer — we verify this during the onboarding call. Topics are agreed 2 weeks in advance.

title: Backend Engineer — M-Pesa & Payment API Integration
description: Integrate Safaricom Daraja (STK Push, B2C, C2B), Flutterwave, and Pesapal payment gateways into our existing Express.js backend with full webhook handling, idempotency keys, and atomic database transactions. You will write comprehensive Jest unit tests targeting 85% coverage, document all endpoints in Swagger, and deploy to our AWS EC2 staging environment. Prior experience building production M-Pesa integrations is required — please include relevant projects in your proposal.

title: Flutter Developer for Healthcare App
description: Build a Flutter-based telemedicine app for rural health workers to book specialists and submit patient reports with offline-first capability using SQLite and background sync. The app must support low-bandwidth conditions (2G), implement end-to-end encrypted messaging between patient and doctor, handle KEMR form submissions, and integrate with our existing Node.js REST API. The app will be deployed to Play Store and Apple App Store. HIPAA-aligned data handling practices are required.

title: Machine Learning Engineer — Fraud Detection Model
description: Develop and deploy a real-time fraud detection model for our mobile banking platform processing over 50,000 transactions daily. You will perform EDA on 18 months of transaction data, engineer features, train and evaluate at least 3 candidate models (targeting >97% precision at <0.1% false positive rate), deploy the winner to AWS SageMaker with a REST inference endpoint, and build a monitoring dashboard to track model drift. NDA required before data access.

title: WordPress Developer for NGO Website Redesign
description: Redesign and migrate our existing NGO website to a modern WordPress theme with donation functionality via M-Pesa and PayPal, multilingual support (English and Swahili), and WCAG AA accessibility compliance. Deliverables include a staging site for review, full content migration from the old site, staff training session (2 hours, remote), and 3 months of post-launch support. The site averages 3,000 visitors per month and must score above 85 on Google PageSpeed Insights.

title: Brand Identity & Graphic Design Package
description: Create a full brand identity package for our organic food startup that reflects sustainability, freshness, and Kenyan heritage. Deliverables: 3 logo concepts with refinement rounds, final logo in all formats (SVG, PNG, PDF), colour palette and typography guide, business card design, packaging mockup for 3 product lines, and a 20-page brand guidelines PDF. We will provide mood boards and competitor references. Two revision rounds are included — additional rounds billed separately.

title: Financial Accountant — Startup Bookkeeping & Tax Filing
description: Manage monthly bookkeeping, reconcile bank statements, prepare monthly management accounts, file quarterly VAT returns on KRA iTax, and prepare the annual financial statements for a SaaS startup with 12 employees and approximately KES 4M monthly revenue. You must be a CPA(K) with at least 3 years experience working with Kenyan tech startups. QuickBooks Online is our primary tool. Work is remote with a monthly review call. An NDA will be signed before access to financial data.

title: Customer Support Team Lead — SaaS Product
description: Lead a team of 5 customer support agents for our B2B SaaS platform used by 800 SMEs. Your responsibilities include setting team KPIs (targeting CSAT >90%, first-response <2h), conducting weekly 1-on-1s, building and maintaining a Zendesk knowledge base, handling tier-2 escalations, and producing monthly support reports for the CEO. You will also be the primary liaison with the product team to log and prioritise bugs raised by customers. Prior SaaS team lead experience required.

title: DevOps Engineer — CI/CD Pipeline & AWS Infrastructure
description: Design and implement a production-grade CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions for a microservices architecture (8 services) deployed on AWS ECS with Fargate. Responsibilities include writing Dockerfiles and Helm charts, setting up auto-scaling policies, configuring CloudWatch alarms and PagerDuty alerting, implementing blue-green deployments with zero-downtime rollbacks, and documenting all runbooks. You will also conduct a security audit of the existing infrastructure and remediate findings. AWS Solutions Architect certification preferred.

title: Copywriter — Email Marketing Campaigns
description: Write compelling email sequences and promotional copy for our weekly newsletters and flash sale campaigns targeting 200,000 subscribers across Kenya and Uganda. You will produce 8 emails per month (4 newsletters, 4 promotional), write subject line variants for A/B testing, and hit a target open rate of 28% and CTR of 4.5%. You must have a proven portfolio of e-commerce email copy with verifiable performance metrics. Familiarity with Mailchimp automation workflows and segmentation is essential.
